app.name: VibeCheck
app.tagline: Build healthy habits with your friends
signIn.termsNotice: By signing in you agree to the Terms and Privacy Policy.
signIn.failed: Couldn't sign in. Please try again.
ageGate.title: How old are you?
ageGate.subtitle: We need your birth year to keep things safe.
ageGate.invalidYear: Please enter a valid birth year.
blocked.title: We can't let you in yet
blocked.message: VibeCheck is available from age 13. Come back when you turn 13 — we'll be here.
parentConsent.title: We need a parent's OK
parentConsent.subtitle: You're under 16 so a parent or guardian needs to approve your account. It's the law (GDPR) and we take it seriously.
parentConsent.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
awaitingParent.title: Waiting on parent approval
awaitingParent.subtitle: We sent an email to {{email}}. Once they approve, you'll land here automatically.
focusPicker.title: What do you want to focus on?
focusPicker.subtitle: Pick 1 to 3 areas. You can change this anytime.
profileSetup.title: One last thing
profileSetup.subtitle: Choose a username your friends will see.
home.emptyHabits: Add your first habit to get started.
habits.title: Habits
habits.freeTierLimit: Free tier allows 3 active habits. VibeCheck Pro unlocks unlimited.
mood.title: How are you feeling?
mood.subtitle: No judgment. Just mark how it is.
mood.lowMoodAlertBody: Talking to someone can help. The Teen Crisis Line 116 111 is free and available 24/7.
friends.title: Your crew
friends.empty: Invite friends to see the leaderboard.
profile.title: Profile
profile.hideFromLeaderboardsHint: Nobody will see your score in friend leaderboards.
crisis.title: You can always ask for help
crisis.note: Talking to someone you trust is a sign of strength, not weakness.
progress.title: Your progress
progress.streakFreezeHint: Earn a freeze every 7 active days. It protects your streak if you miss one.
progress.noChallenges: No challenges yet. Join or create one.
skill.sleepMastery.name: Sleep Mastery
skill.sleepMastery.description: Consistent sleep compounds focus in adult life.
skill.physicalResilience.name: Physical Resilience
skill.physicalResilience.description: Movement builds energy and stress tolerance.
skill.emotionalIntelligence.name: Emotional Intelligence
skill.emotionalIntelligence.description: Naming emotions helps you regulate them.
skill.bodyAwareness.name: Body Awareness
skill.bodyAwareness.description: Listening to your body is a lifelong health habit.
skill.discipline.name: Discipline
skill.discipline.description: Consistency is a superpower — it transfers everywhere.
achievement.firstWeek.name: First week
achievement.streak30.name: Month marathon
achievement.sleepChampion.name: Sleep Champion
achievement.hydrationHero.name: Hydration Hero
achievement.mindMaster.name: Mind Master
achievement.comebackKid.name: Comeback Kid
achievement.comebackKid.description: You came back after a 3-day break.
achievement.firstFriend.name: First Friend
achievement.challengeFinisher.name: Challenge Finisher
achievement.level10.name: Level 10
achievement.moodJournalingWeek.name: Mood Journaler
challenge.title: Challenges
challenge.publicHint: Anyone can join. Off = only friends see it.
insights.correlationTitle: What we noticed in your data
insights.correlationPositive: days with this habit — mood ran higher
insights.correlationNegative: days with this habit — mood ran lower
notifications.title: Your daily VibeCheck
notifications.body: Quick check-in time. How's it going today?
notifications.dailyReminderHint: One gentle nudge so you don't break your streak.
notifications.lowMoodAlertsHint: Gentle support when we see things are tough.
paywall.title: VibeCheck Pro
paywall.subtitle: More habits, full AI insights, private challenges. Everything that actually builds you.
paywall.safetyPromise: Safety features are always free: crisis line, hide from leaderboards, low-mood support.
paywall.termsNote: Auto-renewing subscription. Cancel any time in your app store settings.
paywall.comingSoonBody: Subscriptions go live soon. We'll let you know.
paywall.thanksBody: Welcome to Pro. All features unlocked.
paywall.privateProBody: Public challenges are free. Private ones unlock with Pro.
